observed_gaps.name: benchmark_reasoning
observed_gaps.why: v42 needs to recover the benchmark-specialist edge from v40_benchmax while keeping v41's broader multimodal utility.

observed_gaps.name: response_quality
observed_gaps.why: v41 improved presentation but still underperforms on response selection and final answer quality.

observed_gaps.name: agentic_coding_and_verification
observed_gaps.why: v42 should route to better verifier-first coding behavior and retain stronger repair traces from Qwen3-Coder-Next style supervision.

observed_gaps.name: multimodal_grounding
observed_gaps.why: Gemma 4 and Qwen3-Omni expose better grounded multimodal behaviors than the current v41 prep mix.

observed_gaps.name: diversity_and_global_coverage
observed_gaps.why: Qwen3.5 explicitly broadens long-context, multilingual, and tool-use coverage that the current v41 dataset underrepresents.

bounded_teachers.role: mid-sized multimodal and instruction style comparisons

teacher_roles.why: Use it for benchmark replay, verifier rows, and failure-cluster curriculum.
Use it for image-grounded comparisons, safer multimodal phrasing, and controlled explanation style.
Use it for long-context summaries, tool traces, reasoning budgets, and route-then-answer rows.
Use it for code-edit planning, test repair, and repository-grounded debugging traces.
Use it for caption, OCR-style, video, and cross-modal route supervision.

teacher_mixture_rules: Never let any single hosted teacher dominate the distilled mix.
Keep benchmark replay anchored to v40_benchmax plus local verifier rows.
Keep Gemma 4 bounded to grounded multimodal slices instead of generic chat domination.
Use Qwen3-Coder-Next only on coding-heavy prompts so the rest of the mix stays broad.

turboquant_runtime_note.purpose: Use TurboQuant-style KV compression or equivalent when generating long teacher traces so the data program can afford deeper verifier passes.
turboquant_runtime_note.training_implication: Supervise budget choice and evidence compression, not the quantization algorithm itself.

new_heads.name: budget_router_head
new_heads.purpose: Predict whether a prompt needs short, medium, or deep reasoning before the model spends extra compute.

new_heads.name: teacher_consensus_head
new_heads.purpose: Separate answer confidence from agreement confidence so the model can learn when to distrust a single teacher.

new_heads.name: cache_budget_head
new_heads.purpose: Teach the model how much evidence to keep active and when compressed context is enough.

new_heads.name: verifier_gate_head
new_heads.purpose: Learn when a second-pass verifier or repair step is worth the latency on coding and reasoning prompts.

novel_v42_ideas: Benchmark bridge curriculum: replay v40-style hard clusters directly inside the broader v41 omni scaffold.
Teacher role specialization: use Gemma 4, Qwen 3.5, Qwen3-Coder-Next, and Qwen3-Omni for sharply different data slices instead of generic all-purpose distillation.
TurboQuant-inspired context economy: train explicit evidence-budget labels so long-context behavior improves without inflating every answer.
Partial reasoning distillation: keep good early and mid reasoning segments, not only full-length traces.
Verifier-first coding: train code repair rows where a verifier note or failing test arrives before the final patch.
Diversity expansion by scenario, modality, and user goal rather than only adding more generic chat volume.

data_program.name: v40_benchmark_bridge
data_program.source_style: v40 hard-example replay, failure clusters, and verifier-guided benchmark repair
data_program.goal: Close the measured v40-v41 benchmark gap without collapsing the omni model into a narrow benchmark specialist.

data_program.name: gemma4_grounded_multimodal
data_program.source_style: bounded Gemma 4 image-text and grounded explanation slices
data_program.goal: Lift multimodal grounding and safer, clearer explanation quality.

data_program.name: qwen35_long_context_and_tool_use
data_program.source_style: Qwen3.5 long-context, tool-use, and reasoning-budget traces
data_program.goal: Improve route choice, long-context stability, and tool-aware reasoning.

data_program.name: qwen3_coder_next_agentic_repairs
data_program.source_style: agentic coding, repository-grounded edits, failing tests, and patch repair traces
data_program.goal: Make coding behavior more deliberate and more verifiable than v41's mostly answer-level repair mix.

data_program.name: qwen3_omni_audio_video_alignment
data_program.source_style: audio, video, OCR-style, and cross-modal route supervision
data_program.goal: Improve multimodal specialist routing and richer omni prompt understanding.

data_program.name: verifier_guided_self_correction
data_program.goal: Teach v42 to repair weak drafts with targeted feedback rather than only rerolling responses.

data_program.name: partial_reasoning_distill
data_program.source_style: high-quality partial chains, truncated reasoning, and early-stop successful traces
data_program.goal: Keep strong reasoning while reducing wasteful overthinking on easy or medium tasks.

data_program.name: global_diversity_and_style
data_program.source_style: broader users, locales, tones, professions, and request styles
data_program.goal: Make the dataset larger and more diverse in a meaningful way instead of only duplicating similar prompts.

data_program.name: cache_budget_and_context_selection
data_program.source_style: compressed evidence selection, context budget labels, and when-to-stop traces
data_program.goal: Translate TurboQuant-style efficiency lessons into trainable budget and evidence behavior.

data_program.name: specialist_dense_topups_v42
data_program.source_style: materials, protein, 3D, science vision, and model-selection top-ups
data_program.goal: Preserve the specialist fusion edge while expanding coding, benchmark, and multimodal coverage.

training_program.recipe: Train route choice, verifier choice, and short-medium-deep budget prediction before heavier SFT.
training_program.inspiration: reasoning budget control plus route-first supervision

training_program.recipe: Mix v41 carryover rows with v40 hard examples and the new Gemma/Qwen role-specific teacher slices.
training_program.inspiration: teacher specialization instead of flat all-model distillation

training_program.recipe: Keep only repairs that beat the draft under verifier heuristics or benchmark-style exact checks.
Distill good partial traces and explicit early-stop examples so v42 learns when enough reasoning is enough.
Run code-edit, test-repair, and repo-grounded critique->patch loops with Coder-Next style traces.
training_program.inspiration: agentic coding teachers and repair-first data

training_program.recipe: Short final phase on Gemma 4 and Qwen3-Omni slices for grounded image/audio/video route supervision.

runtime_recommendations.teacher_generation_acceleration: TurboQuant-style KV compression or equivalent cache reduction for long teacher passes

promotion_protocol.preview_selection_rule: Promote only checkpoints that beat v41 overall and stay within multimodal regression limits while closing the v40 benchmark gap.
must_not_regress: stage2 vision_accuracy vs v41 by more than 0.02
stage2 domain_accuracy vs v41 by more than 0.02
coding repair pack vs v41 by more than 0.01
promotion_protocol.hard_gate: No promotion if common benchmark exact remains below v40_benchmax.

recent_method_references.name: TurboQuant: Online Vector Quantization with Near-optimal Distortion Rate
recent_method_references.why: Treat TurboQuant as a runtime enabler for longer teacher traces and cheaper verifier passes, not as a weight-training substitute.

recent_method_references.name: Small Language Models Need Strong Verifiers to Self-Correct Reasoning
recent_method_references.why: Add explicit critique and repair supervision instead of assuming the student will self-correct from final answers alone.

recent_method_references.name: Self-Enhanced Reasoning Training
recent_method_references.why: Use self-generated reasoning paths selectively to activate latent reasoning without requiring giant chain-of-thought corpora everywhere.

recent_method_references.name: Lost at the Beginning of Reasoning
recent_method_references.why: Prefer high-quality first steps and route choices so the model does not waste budget on weak starts.

recent_method_references.name: Learning from Partial Chain-of-Thought via Truncated-Reasoning Self-Distillation
recent_method_references.why: Distill useful partial traces so v42 can stop earlier on easy problems without losing answer quality.

recent_method_references.name: google/gemma-4-31B-it
recent_method_references.why: Use Gemma 4 as a bounded teacher for grounded multimodal answers, image reasoning, and careful presentation.

recent_method_references.name: Qwen/Qwen3.5-397B-A17B
recent_method_references.why: Use Qwen 3.5 for long-context, tool-use, and reasoning traces, especially where v41 is weak against v40_benchmax.

recent_method_references.name: Qwen/Qwen3-Coder-Next
recent_method_references.why: Use Coder-Next for code-edit, test-repair, and long-horizon debugging traces instead of only one-shot code answers.

recent_method_references.name: Qwen/Qwen3-Omni-30B-A3B-Instruct
recent_method_references.why: Use the omni model for audio-video alignment, captioning, OCR-style prompts, and broader multimodal route supervision.

v40_manifest_snapshot.objective: Beat the current best common benchmark leader with a controlled, additive experiment line.
novel_features: benchmark promotion gate with nearest-comparator deltas
strict checkpoint soup compatibility checks and dry-run mode
reasoning-budget control flags for shorter or longer verifier passes
teacher-repair replay rows that preserve both failed draft and corrected answer
failure-cluster curriculum that can oversample benchmark miss families
multi-teacher consensus distillation with agreement metadata
verifier-replay training rows synthesized from benchmark misses
budget-aware fast/slow verifier prompts for benchmark-focused refinement

implementation_checklist: Freeze the latest v41 frontier summary and v40 benchmark summary as the v42 design inputs.
Add new v42 dataset builders for benchmark bridge, teacher-role routing, verifier repair, TurboQuant-style budget rows, and diversity expansion.
Keep the v41 data pipeline as the stable base, then add v42 row groups on top instead of rewriting the whole training loop.
Use Gemma 4 and Qwen 3.5 family models only in bounded, role-specific slices.
Evaluate preview checkpoints on the common benchmark plus coding-repair and multimodal route packs before promotion.
